zh.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipman是John Cheapman的兒子，於1520年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 馬丁。他於1544年7月7日與Joana Hodge在英國可瓦爾布利曼德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年1月28日之前在英國薩默塞特登斯特，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipman是John Cheapman的儿子，于1520年出生在英国可瓦爾聖 馬丁。他于1544年7月7日与Joana Hodge在英国可瓦爾布利曼德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年1月28日之前在英国薩默塞特登斯特，埋葬在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Chipman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Chapman
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

nameMeanings.name: Johanes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipman was born in 1520, in St Martin, Cornwall, England as the son of John Cheapman. He married Joana Hodge on 7 July 1544, in Blisland, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died before 28 January 1591, in Dunster, Somerset, England, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipman est né en 1520, à St Martin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, fils de John Cheapman. Il a épousé Joana Hodge le 7 juillet 1544, à Blisland, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé avant 28 janvier 1591, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipman wurde 1520 in St Martin, Cornwall, England, als Sohn von John Cheapman geboren. Er hat am 7. Juli 1544 in Blisland, Cornwall, England Joana Hodge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb vor 28. Januar 1591 in Dunster, Somerset, England und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipman è nato il nel 1520 nel St Martin, Cornwall, England come figlio di John Cheapman. Lui sposato Joana Hodge il 7 luglio 1544, nel Blisland, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì prima del 28 gennaio 1591, nel Dunster, Somerset, England, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipmanは1520年にイギリスコルンワルスト マルティンでJohn Cheapmanの息子として生まれた。1544年7月7日にイギリスコルンワルブリスランドでJoana Hodgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1591年1月28日以前にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipman(은)는 1520년 영국 코른월 스트 마틴에서 John Cheapman의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1544년 7월 7일 영국 코른월 블리슬랜드에서 Joana Hodge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 1월 28일 이전 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipman nasceu em 1520, em St Martin, Cornwall, Inglaterra filho de John Cheapman. Ele casou-se com Joana Hodge em 7 de julho de 1544, em Blisland, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 28 de janeiro de 1591, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipman родился в 1520 г. в местности ст мартинь, корнвалл, Англия. Его отца звали John Cheapman. Он женился на женщине по имени Joana Hodge 7 июля 1544 г. в местности блисланд, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер перед 28 январь 1591 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Johanes Chipman nació en 1520, en St Martin, Cornwall, Inglaterra como hijo de John Cheapman. Se casó con Joana Hodge el 7 de julio de 1544, en Blisland, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió antes de 28 de enero de 1591, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
